nicu.title: NICU & Baby Care
nicu.subtitle: Specialized Neonatal Intensive Care Unit
nicu.heroDescription: A dedicated unit providing specialized medical care for newborns, premature babies, and infants requiring intensive monitoring and treatment. Our NICU is equipped with advanced life-support systems and staffed by expert neonatologists and pediatric nurses.
nicu.description: Our Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) provides 24/7 specialized care for premature and critically ill newborns. With state-of-the-art equipment and a compassionate team of neonatologists, pediatric nurses, and support staff, we ensure the best possible care for your precious little ones.

features.title: 24/7 Monitoring
features.description: Round-the-clock supervision by trained medical staff

guidelines: Parents can visit during designated hours (10 AM - 12 PM, 4 PM - 6 PM)
Only two visitors allowed at a time per baby
Proper hand hygiene mandatory before entering NICU
Mobile phones to be kept on silent mode
Photography requires permission from medical staff
Kangaroo Mother Care encouraged for stable babies
